rcomplex 0.1.0
  • Reference

Build combined fold-enrichment matrix on GPU via torch

Source: R/summary.R
adj_to_gpu.Rd

Precomputes combined[a, b] = FE1(b->a) + FE2(a->b) where:

  • FE1(b, a) = |N1(a) \(\cap\) R1(b)| / E1(a, b), anchor = net1

  • FE2(a, b) = |N2(b) \(\cap\) R2(a)| / E2(a, b), anchor = net2

adj_to_gpu(net_mat, thr, dtype, device)

Arguments

net_mat

Co-expression matrix (n x n).

thr

Co-expression threshold.

dtype

Torch dtype for the result.

device

Torch device string.

net1_mat, net2_mat

Co-expression matrices (n1 x n1, n2 x n2).

thr1, thr2

Co-expression thresholds.

ortho_sp1_idx, ortho_sp2_idx

0-based ortholog gene indices.

Value

Numeric matrix (n1 x n2) — the combined fold-enrichment matrix.

Binary adjacency tensor (n x n) on device, diagonal = 0.

Details

Overlaps are computed via matrix multiply (GEMM) on GPU — O(n^3) but runs in milliseconds on CUDA/MPS vs seconds on CPU. The resulting matrix converts each permutation from O(MNn_words) bit-vector popcount operations to O(M*N) table lookups.

Contents
